scripts.build:all: pnpm build && cp -r out server/frontend && cp -r out src-tauri/resources/server/frontend
scripts.build:mac:arm64: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm build:server && rm -rf src-tauri/resources/server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/changelogs src-tauri/resources/server/package-lock.json && cp -r server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/dist && cp server/prisma/schema.prisma src-tauri/resources/server/prisma/schema.prisma && cp -r changelogs src-tauri/resources/changelogs && cd src-tauri/resources/server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && cd ../../.. && tauri build && node scripts/rename-bundle.mjs aarch64
scripts.build:mac:intel: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm build:server && rm -rf src-tauri/resources/server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/changelogs src-tauri/resources/server/package-lock.json && cp -r server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/dist && cp server/prisma/schema.prisma src-tauri/resources/server/prisma/schema.prisma && cp -r changelogs src-tauri/resources/changelogs && cd src-tauri/resources/server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && cd ../../.. && tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin && node scripts/rename-bundle.mjs x86_64
